title: This 26 y/o 10x'd Revenue Doing the Opposite of Every AI Startup | Paraform, John Kim
summary: John Kim built Paraform, a hiring platform that has paid out $50 million to human recruiters while competitors race to replace them. The company achieved 10x revenue growth by betting on human expertise as the core moat in recruitment, serving customers like Palantir and Rippling, contrary to prevailing AI startup trends.
